---
title: "ML6 Senior Engineer Challenge"
---

## Use Case 1 — Clustering Sensor Data

Customer A collects data from **20 sensors** on a machine. Of 1600 observed breakdowns:

- **40** are expert-labeled with breakdown reasons
- **1560** are unlabeled

**Goal:** Use the 40 labeled points to guide clustering of all 1600 breakdowns into meaningful groups.

## Use Case 2 — Sports Analytics

Customer B has gathered **video data of soccer games**.

**Goal:** Determine how many players per team are visible on screen at any given time.

[https://github.com/wissebarkhof/ml6](https://github.com/wissebarkhof/ml6)
